stdin_parsed.last_assistant_message:
Done. Script at `~/.config/dorothy/commands/setup-driver-nvidia`.

Key decisions:
- `set -euo pipefail` — aborts on any error, unset var, or pipe failure
- `pacman -Rdd` to remove conflicting packages without dep errors (safe — we immediately replace)
- Dracut target is `/tmp/initrd-nvidia-build-$$` (PID-unique), then `cp` to `/boot/<machine-id>/<kernel>/initrd`
- `--hostonly` keeps initrd size smaller
- `--tmpdir /tmp` routes dracut's working files away from /boot

Run: `setup-driver-nvidia`
